prompt: Generate Storybook documentation for our color primitives. The CSS file is at fn-storybook-docs-workspace/evals/files/tokens/colors.css. We use OKLCH with a 12-step ramp per palette. Include all palettes (neutral, brand, red, amber, green), step roles, and a dark theme comparison. Use the helpers from stories/helpers/.
assertions: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All 5 palettes have dedicated stories: neutral, brand, red, amber, green
Step role annotations present for all ranges: background, surface, border, solid, text
ThemeComparison story with data-theme light and dark wrappers
Uses Swatch or SwatchGrid or TonalRamp from stories/helpers/
Uses DocPage with Section and SectionHeading from stories/helpers/
CSS custom property names derived from source (--colors-neutral-50 etc.)
Zero inline style attributes in story JSX — all visual via helpers
Overview story showing all palettes at a glance
